title: Array (ARRY) Q1 2026 Earnings & Stock Performance Analysis
text:
Array (ARRY) Q1 2026 Earnings & Stock Performance

Financial Results:
Array reported Q1 2026 earnings that exceeded expectations in key areas:

- Revenue: $223.4 million, beating analyst estimates of $201.7 million by 10.8%, though down 26.1% year-over-year
- Adjusted EPS: $0.06 versus consensus estimate of -$0.05 (significant beat)
- Adjusted EBITDA: $28.83 million, substantially exceeding the $8.09 million estimate

Stock Performance:
The solar tracking systems manufacturer's stock surged following the announcement, with shares jumping 10.9% to $9.03 immediately after reporting.

Forward Guidance Concerns:
While earnings beat expectations, next quarter's revenue guidance disappointed investors. Management projected $310 million in revenue for Q2, representing a 20.1% miss against Wall Street forecasts.

CEO Kevin Hostetler stated: ARRAY began 2026 with strong performance, delivering revenue and Adjusted EBITDA above the expectations and highlighted a record orderbook of $2.4 billion.

Key Metrics:
- Operating margin declined to 3.2% from 9% year-over-year
- Free cash flow deteriorated to -$36.93 million versus -$13.06 million in the prior quarter
- Full-year revenue guidance reconfirmed at $1.45 billion (midpoint)
